description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test that runs on push and pull requests to master and array_algebra branches. The workflow should have four jobs: build-test-cpu, build-test-cpu-release, build-test-cpu-openmp-python-asserts, and build-test-python-macos-clang. Each job should run on a specific environment (ubuntu-18.04 or macos-10.15), checkout the code, create a build directory, run cmake, make, and test with specific configurations and environment variables.
